items.name_en: 💚2025 Spring/Summer Collection Gucci 73 Series draws inspiration from a vintage bucket bag released in the same year as the collection name. This bag interprets the horsebit motif with modern aesthetics. It can be worn crossbody, on the shoulder, or carried as a handbag. Model 833665, Calfskin, Mini size: 18.5x20x8.5

items.name_en: 💝💝Genuine Leather💝💝 M23640 Black M23698 White This OnTheGo East West bag introduces the OnTheGo small tote design, reinterpreting the East West ample silhouette with Monogram Empreinte leather. Giant Monogram is embossed on the leather body, and the tidy interior can hold daily essentials. Top handle and detachable leather chain shoulder strap allow for various carrying ways. Dimensions: 25 x 13 x 10cm

items.name_en: 💦Chane1🧩24p hoho Shoulder Bag A. Collects all elements of 19bag, emitting a low-key luxury vibe~ It can easily handle any style of outfit. The combination of chain and leather cleverly balances toughness and softness, showcasing a girl's unique charm. Very suitable for spring and summer. The real item looks better than the picture. The large diamond quilt is more fashionable. Size: 13×20×4.5cm

items.name_en: 💫👍🏻Chanel Gabrielle Chanel's innovation never disappoints. By integrating power and elegant design aesthetics into the original beauty, this Chanel Gabrielle Travel Bag was born 💯. It first appeared at the 2017 Spring/Summer Haute Couture show, and its presence has been everywhere at the recent fashion week. Delicate and soft bag body with hard and structured bottom fully embodies Mademoiselle Chanel's pursuit of freedom and comfort. size:20cm
